full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and on track. The app features a Pomodoro timer, which allows users to work in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. The intervals are customizable, allowing users to tailor the timer to their specific needs. Additionally, the app includes distraction-blocking tools, such as website blockers and notification silencers, to help users avoid common distractions. With Focus Timer, users can prioritize their tasks, stay motivated, and maintain a sustainable work-life balance. The app is simple, intuitive, and easy to use, making it an essential tool for anyone looking to boost their productivity and achieve their goals.
